tasks.instruction: Wybierz poprawna odpowiedz A, B lub C.

items.stem: The success of the project depends entirely _________ the amount of funding we receive.
She finally succeeded _________ persuading her parents to let her study abroad.
Teacher: What caused the experiment to fail? Student: The mistake resulted _________ a miscalculation in the formula.
The new medicine has proved to be very effective _________ treating the disease.
Anna: Why did they punish him? Ben: He was accused _________ cheating during the exam.
The police are looking into a case that bears a strong resemblance _________ one from last year.
